_comment: FreeRTOS Task Definitions — Complete task layout, priorities, stacks, and inter-task communication for ESP32 marine autopilot

tasks.name: task_pid_control
tasks.description: Execute PID control loop. Compute rudder command from heading error. Drive solenoid MOSFETs. NEVER blocks — NEVER calls blocking API.
tasks.notes: Highest application priority (25 reserved for NMI/panic). CPU utilization ~25%. WCET ~2.5ms. Reads shared variables written by lower-priority tasks. Uses xTaskNotifyWait with 0 timeout to check for gain updates.

tasks.name: task_watchdog
tasks.description: Monitor health of all tasks, verify PID executing, manage external WDT, generate alarms, update status LEDs.
tasks.notes: Checks: PID heartbeat <50ms, compass fresh <500ms, Jetson heartbeat <2000ms, rudder fresh <200ms. Kicks MAX6818 every cycle. Updates LEDs and buzzer.. Also checks I2C bus health (no successful I2C transaction in 200ms → I2C_BUS_ERROR alarm).

tasks.name: task_nmea_parser
tasks.description: Parse incoming NMEA 0183 sentences from UART1. Validate checksums. Extract heading, GPS, wind, APB data.
tasks.notes: Largest stack (string parsing). Woken by UART1 RX DMA event. Parses HDM/HDT/HDG/RMC/GGA/APB/RMB/VHW/MWV. Updates shared navigation data.

tasks.name: task_serial_jetson_tx
tasks.description: Transmit telemetry messages to Jetson over UART2. JSON serialization + CRC-16 checksum.
tasks.notes: Telemetry at 10Hz (heading, rudder, PID state) and 1Hz (full status). Rate-limited to prevent UART flooding.

tasks.name: task_serial_jetson_rx
tasks.description: Receive and parse commands from Jetson over UART2. Validate, bounds-check, execute.
tasks.notes: Parses set_heading, engage, standby, set_mode, set_gains, get_status, calibrate, heartbeat, etc. Updates Jetson heartbeat timestamp.

tasks.name: task_compass_reader
tasks.description: Read BNO085 compass via I2C at 10Hz. Apply IIR filter. Update shared heading (double-buffered).
tasks.notes: IIR filter alpha=0.3 (~3Hz cutoff). Double-buffer for atomic PID reads. Checks compass health (rate-of-change sanity). Requires i2c0_mutex.

tasks.name: task_rudder_feedback
tasks.description: Read AS5048A encoder via I2C (or potentiometer via ADC) at 50Hz. Update shared rudder angle.
tasks.notes: Median filter (5 samples). Rate limiter rejects >500°/sec. If AS5048A: read I2C 0x40 reg 0xFE/0xFF. If pot: ADC1_CH5. Requires i2c0_mutex for encoder.

tasks.name: task_current_monitor
tasks.description: Read ACS712 current sensors (drive circuit, clutch) via I2C ADC (ADS1115). Detect overcurrent, stall, clutch engagement.
tasks.notes: NEW task (not in Brief 02, required by Brief 03). Reads 2 ACS712 sensors via ADS1115 I2C ADC @0x48. Detects: overcurrent (>4A drive, >3A clutch), stall (high current + no rudder movement), clutch engagement (current >0.5A).

tasks.name: task_button_handler
tasks.description: Debounce and process physical button inputs. Short/long press detection. Execute actions.
tasks.notes: 6 buttons (AUTO/STBY, PORT±1/±10, STBD±1/±10, MODE). ISR sets notification bits. 50ms debounce. Long press >1000ms. GPIO35-40 are input-only (external pull-ups required).

tasks.name: task_display_oled
tasks.description: Update SSD1306 128x64 OLED display. Render pages (status, detailed, calibration, system).
tasks.notes: 5Hz refresh. Framebuffer 1024 bytes included in stack. Shares I2C0 with compass/encoder (i2c0_mutex). 4 display pages cycled by MODE long-press.

tasks.name: task_mqtt_client
tasks.description: Optional WiFi telemetry. Publish autopilot state to MQTT broker (Signal K). Remote monitoring via tablet/phone.
tasks.notes: DISABLED BY DEFAULT. WiFi on Core 1 to avoid PID jitter. Remote commands DISABLED by default (require OLED confirmation). TX power minimum. Auto-disables if PID misses deadline.

queues._comment: FreeRTOS message queues for structured inter-task data transfer

jetson_tx_queue.description: Telemetry messages from any task -> task_serial_jetson_tx

jetson_rx_queue.description: Parsed commands from task_serial_jetson_rx -> command dispatcher

alarm_queue.description: Alarm events from any task -> task_watchdog + task_display_oled

display_queue.description: Display update requests from any task -> task_display_oled

i2c0_mutex.description: Protects I2C0 bus access (compass, rudder encoder, OLED display)
i2c0_mutex._comment_timeout: Fix C-06: Mutex acquisition MUST use finite timeout to prevent indefinite blocking if I2C bus is locked.

nvs_mutex.description: Protects NVS (flash) access for calibration data persistence

pid_gains_mutex.description: Protects multi-field PID gains update (all gains written atomically)

heading_mutex.description: Fix C-05: Replaces unprotected double-buffer for heading data. Atomic copy with mutex prevents TOCTOU race condition between compass writer (priority 18) and PID reader (priority 24). Writer acquires lock, writes single buffer, releases. Reader acquires lock, copies to local, releases. Lock hold time < 1µs — no impact on PID timing.
heading_mutex.notes: All shared heading data placed in uncached DRAM to ensure inter-core cache coherence. Double-buffer pattern removed — single buffer with mutex is safer.

uart1_rx_semaphore.description: NMEA data available on UART1 RX (set by DMA ISR)

uart2_rx_semaphore.description: Jetson command data available on UART2 RX (set by DMA ISR)

system_events.description: System state bit flags for cross-task state awareness

3.name: RUDDER_CALIBRATED
3.description: Rudder sensor calibration stored in NVS

6.name: ALARM_ACTIVE
6.description: At least one alarm is active

7.name: WATER_SPEED_VALID
7.description: Water speed data received within timeout

memory._comment: Memory budget estimates for ESP32-S3 with 8MB PSRAM

i2c_bus_watchdog._comment: Fix C-06: I2C bus lockup detection and recovery. If SCL held low >25ms by a stuck slave, bus is locked and all I2C devices stop communicating.

recovery_details.step_1: Detect SCL held low for >25ms via GPIO interrupt on SCL pin
recovery_details.step_2: Switch SCL to GPIO mode, manually toggle HIGH-LOW 9 times at ~100kHz
recovery_details.step_3: Generate STOP condition (SDA HIGH while SCL HIGH)
recovery_details.step_5: Verify bus recovery by reading a known device (e.g., BNO085 WHO_AM_I register)
recovery_details.on_failure_after_max_attempts: Generate I2C_BUS_ERROR alarm, trigger alarm action
